name: Classic Hamburger Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10-3/4 ozs low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet, cook turkey, onions, and bell peppers until no pink remains in the meat and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in frozen mixed vegetables, cream of mushroom soup, water, salt, and black pepper.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
6. Spoon mashed potatoes in mounds around the edge of the casserole.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 25 minutes or until heated through.
8. Top with grated cheddar cheese and bake an additional 5 minutes longer.
